categories.name: IF THE HYPHEN BECOMES A LETTER

questions.clue: The hyphen in the newspaper's viewpoint page becomes a "T": this word meaning "chose"
The hyphen in a car's 180 becomes a "P":this good day for the market
The hyphen in a mixed dorm becomes a "D": you've done this, written a computer program
The hyphen in something you can do to a document via computer becomes an "N":this Navy rank
The hyphen in a kids' movie indicator becomes a "Y":what Elvis' hips did

final.clue: A 1796 medical experiment with an English farm girl ultimately led to this breakthrough announced in Geneva May 8, 1980
